name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help us improve SysMac
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
 - SysMac Version: [e.g. v1.0.0]
 - macOS Version: [e.g. macOS 14.0 Sonoma]
 - Architecture: [e.g. Apple Silicon M1 / Intel]
 - Language: [e.g. English / Spanish]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Log Output
If possible, attach log output from Console.app (filter by "SysMac").
